headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Camden Prop Trust, Lowers Price Target to $106
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $110 to $106.
